skills.name: jabooda-cares-info
skills.description: Organization overview, mission, programs, certifications, and contact info for Jabooda Cares, an AANHPI-led 501(c)(3) nonprofit affordable housing developer in Seattle.

skills.name: construction-lead-inquiry
skills.description: Submit a construction lead inquiry for multifamily general contracting services in the Seattle area. Requires name, email, and project details.

skills.name: eb5-investor-inquiry
skills.description: Submit an EB-5 investor inquiry for USCIS-approved regional center projects in Seattle. Requires name, email, country of origin, and investment range.
